profile.name: Adem Baran Orhan
profile.title: AI & Data Engineer
profile.bio: AI & Data Engineer and Hacettepe AI graduate. I build at the intersection of LLMs, scalable data pipelines, and real products. Currently at Picus Security (a fast-growing SF startup), building AI for cybersecurity. Founder of PromptArena, FlyingPapers ($20k ARR), and Movit.
profile.coffee: Always down to chat about AI, data, and building great products — let's grab a virtual coffee.

site.tagline: I build AI things people actually use.

projects.name: Posecode
projects.tagline: A tiny language LLMs can write — describe human movement as text, get a safe, animated 3D figure in the browser.
projects.description: Open-source (MIT) DSL + engine for physiotherapy, mobility, posture, yoga and training. LLMs author movement phases as readable .posecode text; the parser validates every joint against range-of-motion tables, and a Three.js engine animates the result at 60fps with forward kinematics, ground-lock and IK. Ships an MCP server so agents can generate, validate and share motion natively.
highlights: Every joint clamped to a safe range of motion — always anatomically plausible
Parser → IR → 60fps Three.js renderer with FK, ground-lock & IK
MCP server: LLM agents author & validate motion natively
Open-core monorepo: parser · render · share · eval

projects.name: FlyingPapers
projects.tagline: The AI-native document collection platform for regulated workflows — visa files, apostilles, contracts.
projects.description: Multi-role platform (User, Reviewer, Admin) with AI-powered questionnaire generation, canvas-based PDF editing via Fabric.js, and a structured file upload/translation workflow. Built for processing official documents across 20+ countries.

projects.name: PromptArena
projects.tagline: A real-time arena where you negotiate against AI opponents — and get scored by an AI judge.
projects.description: Built solo from scratch. Users go head-to-head with GPT/Claude/LLaMA opponents in real-time negotiation sessions over WebSockets. A pairwise + rubric-based AI judge system scores each round. Stack: Next.js 15, React 19, FastAPI, Socket.IO, Supabase, Stripe.

projects.name: YourLovePage
projects.tagline: Personal, sharable pages for the things you love (and the people you love).
projects.description: A delightfully simple builder for single-purpose love letters, anniversary sites, and tribute pages. Hyper-minimal UX, beautiful templates, instant publishing on a clean URL.

projects.name: HeyHoney
projects.tagline: A gamified relationship companion for couples — synchronized daily rituals for iOS and Android.
projects.description: An interactive daily ritual for couples. Partners get synchronized prompts, reflect independently, then unlock each other's answers. Built native on iOS and Android with real-time sync, streaks, progress tracking, and dynamic status systems that turn emotional check-ins into a habit.

projects.name: adhd-os
projects.tagline: A voice-note and task management mobile app built specifically for ADHD brains.
projects.description: React Native app with voice-note capture, structured task flows, and a UX designed around ADHD cognitive patterns — low friction capture, minimal context-switching, and progressive disclosure. Built with Expo Router and Supabase.

projects.name: ReelForm
projects.tagline: Your short-form video team, on autopilot — from script to published Reel, no hands required.
projects.description: An autonomous short-form video studio. ReelForm writes brand-tuned scripts, sources and generates the visuals, synthesizes the voiceover, and renders broadcast-quality 9:16 videos with word-synced captions — then auto re-cuts and schedules them across platforms. Built to ship 15+ videos a week for less than the cost of a single freelance edit.

projects.name: Social Profiling
projects.tagline: Predicting age, gender, and race of social media users from text — TÜBITAK-funded research.
projects.description: Bachelor thesis evolving toward journal submission. Twitter/X scraping pipeline → LLM-based topic & sentiment labeling, with BERT/BERTweet baselines. Public Hugging Face Space for labeling and inspection. Recipient of the national TÜBITAK 2209-A undergraduate research grant.
